2025 Season

Meet the
Machine

Reefscape

This year's game sends robots deep into the ocean — literally. Teams score coral on reef structures, hang from deep-sea platforms, and race to complete autonomous routines. It's fast, it's strategic, and it's exactly the kind of chaos we thrive in.

Our Approach

We led with a swerve-drive chassis for maximum field maneuverability, paired with a reliable coral-placement mechanism and a lightweight climb system. Countless hours of driver practice and auto path tuning have gone into making this bot sing.
